name: Contractors
definition: Independent contractors and consultants engaged by the organization

name: Board Members
definition: Members of the board of directors

name: Volunteers
definition: Unpaid volunteers working with the organization

name: Former Employees
definition: Previous employees who have left the organization

name: Secondees
definition: Employees on secondment from other entities

name: Expatriates
definition: Employees working in a country other than their home country

name: Customers
definition: Current customers and clients of the organization

name: Beneficiaries
definition: Beneficiaries of financial products and services

name: Account Holders
definition: Individuals holding accounts with the organization

name: Cardholders
definition: Holders of payment cards issued by the organization

name: Minors
definition: Individuals under the age of legal majority

name: Authorized Representatives
definition: Individuals authorized to act on behalf of others

name: Witnesses
definition: Witnesses in legal or compliance proceedings
